response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web/full-stack and some systems-level experience, but the role demands a hands-on C++ specialist for industrial automation. His professional C++ work dates back to a short stint at National Instruments (2014–2015); his recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or OT protocol experience, which are core to this position.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Event-driven architecture and distributed platform development (GISCollective, Kubernetes deployments)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and mentoring/workshop experience
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience; last professional C++ role ended in 2015
No industrial cybersecurity background (IEC 62443, SDL) or OT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
Career trajectory centers on web/full-stack product work, not industrial automation or embedded platforms
